name: Google Vids
description: AI-powered video creation app in Google Workspace for producing work videos with templates, voiceovers and stock assets.

years.notes: Launch-era Workspace product icon (announced April 2024, GA November 2024). Purple document silhouette with darker folded corner and white play triangle, matching the Google Workspace standard product-icon system. Redrawn into a 24×24 viewBox (scale(0.125) from the native 192×192 source).

2026 Workspace refresh — three stacked rounded rectangles (light→mid→deep indigo/purple) with a horizontal cyan-blue gradient overlay and a vertical top+bottom indigo fade strip, plus a centered white play triangle. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the community Figma file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026' (node 19:10), exported via the Figma Desktop Bridge as SVG_STRING. Mono preserves the full stack: front rounded card with the play triangle carved out (evenodd), mid layer at opacity 0.55, back layer at opacity 0.3 — same fade pattern used by google-docs 2026 mono.
